texto: This is the art of courage: to see things as they are and still believe that the victory lies not with those who avoid the bad but those who taste in living awareness every drop of the good.
explicacao: Citação de Victoria Lincoln sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “This is the art of courage: to see things as they are and still believe that the victory lies not…” articula coragem, reflexao, those em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
